short_summary: War continues, Western commitment signals mixed
rationale: Active war remains the dominant reality; US NATO asset cuts are a continued negative signal for long-term Western military commitment to Ukraine, though no new direct escalation this cycle.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia — ongoing operations
top_events.summary: No major qualitative escalation this cycle; war continues at the same operational tempo with strikes and front-line activity. Baseline decays slightly but remains the defining reality of daily life.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets for NATO Europe
top_events.summary: US reducing NATO Europe military assets is a continued negative signal for Ukraine — it suggests diminishing Western military engagement capacity that Ukraine depends on for long-term support.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reported closer than ever
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could free up US diplomatic bandwidth and ease global energy markets, but has limited direct impact on Ukraine's immediate military situation.
